title: rovrs-v1-implementation
description: Complete v1 implementation of rov.rs link shortener for Shamrock Rovers including monorepo setup, D1 database, redirect worker, admin dashboard with Cloudflare Access auth, analytics, QR codes, CSV import/export, and launch verification.

title: Monorepo setup
description: Create root package.json with workspace scripts, tsconfig.base.json, .gitignore, and all package configs (packages/shared, redirect-worker, queue-consumer, archival-worker, admin) with wrangler.toml files.

title: D1 schema migration
description: Create migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql with links, click_events, destination_history, users tables (10 indexes), 6 seed evergreen links. Create 0002_add_rate_limits.sql with rate_limits table.

title: Shared types and utilities
description: Implement nanoid.ts (12-char IDs, 6-char slugs), slug.ts (validate, normalise, reserved check, soft delete suffix), db.ts (WHERE clause builder, pagination, device type parser), constants.ts (FALLBACK_URL, RESERVED_PATHS, CHANNELS, UTM maps), types.ts (all DB row types, API types, env bindings).

title: Core redirect logic
description: Implement lookupLink (D1 query with expiry/match date checks), updateLinkStatus, handleRedirect (302/301 responses), handleHealth (DB validation), handleRootRedirect. Create test helpers mock.

title: URL validation pipeline
description: Implement validateDestinationUrl with protocol check, private IP detection, DNS resolution (mock), homograph check, shortener loop prevention, known domain warnings. 15 test cases.

title: Click event queuing
description: Implement enqueueClickEvent (extract CF-IPCountry, referrer, device type), queue to Cloudflare Queues with D1 fallback, apply UTM tags for shamrockrovers.ie destinations.

title: Variant UTM tagging
description: Detect variant links via variant_of field, apply platform-specific UTM tags based on channel (Instagram, Facebook, X/Twitter, TikTok, LinkedIn).

title: Offsite preview page
description: Implement renderOffsitePreview with Shamrock Rovers branding, mobile-optimized responsive design, 'Continue →' button, analytics tracking script.

title: Queue consumer
description: Implement queue consumer worker that batches click events from Cloudflare Queues and writes to D1 click_events table with error handling.

title: Admin SPA with Auth
description: Create admin/src with React app structure, setup Vite, configure Tailwind CSS, create _middleware.ts for Cloudflare Access authentication, implement /api/me endpoint for user auto-creation.

title: Links management API
description: Implement POST /api/links (create with validation), GET /api/links (list with search/filter/pagination), GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/links/[slug], POST restore, batch operations endpoint. TDD.

title: Create link page
description: Implement CreateLink.tsx with full form (slug, destination URL, title, campaign, channel, owner, sponsor, opponent, competition, match_date, home_away, expires_at, notes). Real-time validation, error handling.

title: Quick create mode
description: Implement QuickCreate.tsx - paste URL only, auto-generate 6-char slug, instant link creation with copy button. Optional field editing after creation.

title: Match link mode
description: Implement MatchLink.tsx - opponent field, destination URL auto-filled with campaign from opponent, home/away/competition/match_date fields, rolling slug logic.

title: Social variants
description: Implement POST /api/links/{id}/variants (generate -ig, -fb, -x, -tt, -li), PATCH /api/links/{id}/variants (bulk update all variant destinations). Variant grouping in UI.

title: QR code generation
description: Generate PNG QR codes at 256px, 512px, 1024px using qrcode.js. Generate PDF QR codes with title using pdf-lib. Implement expiry warning UI with actions.

title: Admin dashboard
description: Implement Dashboard.tsx with stats cards (total links, clicks today/7d/30d, active links), recent links table, top links table, alerts for expiring/expired/no-clicks-90d/destination-changed.

title: Sponsor report page
description: Implement SponsorReport.tsx with sponsor selector dropdown, date range picker, report table (link slug, destination at time of click, click count, date breakdown, channel breakdown), CSV download button.

title: CSV import
description: Create D1 migration for import_jobs table. Implement POST /api/import/csv with CSV parsing, row validation against schema, queue valid rows, return job_id. GET /api/import/csv/[jobId]/status with progress tracking.

title: Import/export page
description: Implement ImportExport.tsx with tabbed interface - import section (CSV uploader with drag-and-drop, progress tracking), export section (filters for status, campaign, channel, date ranges, download button).

title: Users management and settings
description: Create D1 migration for settings table (slug_blocklist, known_domains). Implement GET/POST /api/users (list users, update roles - admin only). Implement Settings.tsx with User List component, Slug Blocklist Editor, Protected Slugs Editor.

title: Archive download API
description: Implement GET /api/archives/download/[date] that constructs R2 key path, generates signed URLs for secure download, returns download link JSON with record count.

title: Health check enhancement
description: Update /health endpoint to check D1 connectivity (existing) and queue connectivity (test message). Return detailed status (db, queue). Create /api/health in admin Pages Functions.

title: CI/CD pipeline
description: Create .github/workflows/test.yml (lint, test, build), .github/workflows/migrate.yml (D1 migrations), .github/workflows/deploy.yml (test, migrate, deploy redirect, deploy admin). Update package.json scripts.

title: Mobile responsive polish
description: Create useResponsive.ts hook and MobileMenu.tsx component. Update all admin pages for mobile breakpoints: stack stats cards, touch-friendly buttons, responsive tables, optimized layouts.

title: Launch verification
description: Create test/launch-checklist.md, test/seed-data.ts, test/acceptance.spec.ts with Playwright tests for all acceptance criteria from spec section 20. Run performance and security tests.

title: Implement Admin Import/Export Page
description: Create a tabbed interface with CSV upload, import progress tracking, and CSV export with filters for the admin dashboard

title: Create shared types and interfaces for Import/Export
description: Define TypeScript interfaces for CSV import/export data structures, progress tracking types, and filter options to ensure type safety across components

title: Create CSVUploader component
description: Build a reusable CSV uploader component with drag-and-drop support, file validation, and progress display for import operations

title: Create ImportProgress component
description: Develop a progress tracking component that displays real-time import status, success/error counts, and allows cancellation of ongoing imports

title: Create ExportFilters component
description: Build a filter component with date range, status, and search options for CSV exports with applied filters preview

title: Create API service for import/export operations
description: Implement API service functions for CSV upload, import status polling, and CSV export with proper error handling and progress tracking

title: Create main ImportExport page with tabbed interface
description: Build the main ImportExport.tsx page component with tabs for Import and Export sections, integrating all supporting components

title: Update router configuration
description: Add ImportExport route to the admin router and update navigation to include the new page

title: Implement CSV import API endpoint
description: Create Cloudflare Worker API endpoint for handling CSV uploads with validation, parsing, and database insertion

title: Implement CSV export API endpoint
description: Create Cloudflare Worker API endpoint for generating CSV exports with filter support and proper response headers

title: Integration testing and final verification
description: Perform end-to-end testing of the complete import/export flow, including file upload, progress tracking, export with filters, and error scenarios
